title: englerina woodfordioides
intro: Englerina woodfordioides is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antiparasitic activities. The health benefits of Englerina woodfordioides include its potential use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Traditional herbal preparations of Englerina woodfordioides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in African folk medicine.
